start.speaker: brother_maren
start.text: I need to speak with you. Privately. Not here — too many ears in the chapel.

move_private.speaker: brother_maren
move_private.text: They think I poisoned the water. Elara. The lord. Half the village. I can see it in their eyes when I preach.

maren_plea.speaker: brother_maren
maren_plea.text: There is a book — the Tome of Directives — kept in the reliquary beneath the Church Outpost. It records every order the inner circle has ever given. My assignment to Ashvale is in there. The truth of why I was sent.

options.text: Why don't you retrieve it yourself?
And what will the Tome show? That you're innocent — or guilty?
If the truth is in that book, I'll find it.
Breaking into a Church vault sounds expensive. What's in it for me?
Retrieve your own proof. I'm not your errand runner.

why_not_him.speaker: brother_maren
why_not_him.text: Because I've been excommunicated in all but name. The moment I set foot in the Outpost, they'll arrest me. Or worse. The inner circle doesn't tolerate loose ends.

truth_question.speaker: brother_maren
truth_question.text: I... I believe it will show I was ordered here. That the inner circle sent me to Ashvale as part of their expansion. But I won't lie to you — there are parts of my assignment I don't fully remember. The ritual preparations... they blur the mind.

truth_continued.speaker: brother_maren
truth_continued.text: Whatever the Tome says, I'll accept it. I need to know. Even if it condemns me.

maren_offers.speaker: brother_maren
maren_offers.text: I have the Church's cipher. Every coded message they send, I can read. That information is worth more than gold to the right people. Bring me the Tome, and the cipher is yours.

options.text: A Church cipher. Now you're speaking my language. I'll get your book.
Not worth the risk. Even with a cipher.

maren_grateful.speaker: brother_maren
maren_grateful.text: The Outpost is half a day's travel south. The reliquary entrance is behind the altar — look for a stone with the Ashen Light symbol. Press it and the floor opens.

maren_warning.speaker: brother_maren
maren_warning.text: Be warned: the Outpost keeps two sentinels. They are not ordinary guards — they are Ashen Wraiths, men who've undergone the purification ritual. They feel no pain and show no mercy. Avoid them if you can.

maren_final.speaker: brother_maren
maren_final.text: One more thing. If you find the Tome and the truth is... bad. If it shows I volunteered. Bring it to me anyway. I deserve to face what I've done.

options.text: Whatever the Tome says, you'll see it. I promise.
I'll decide what to do with it when I read it.

maren_relief.speaker: brother_maren
maren_relief.text: Thank you. Whatever I am — pawn or monster — at least I'll know. Go with the Light. What's left of it.

maren_uneasy.speaker: brother_maren
maren_uneasy.text: Fair enough. The truth belongs to whoever holds it. I can't argue with that — it's what the Church taught me.

maren_desperate_refuse.speaker: brother_maren
maren_desperate_refuse.text: Then I remain accused. And eventually, accused becomes condemned. I suppose that's justice of a kind. Leave me.
